scripts.build:libs: cd angular-libs && npx ng build broker --configuration production
scripts.start: concurrently -n menu,toolbar,overview,shell -c cyan,blue,magenta,green "npm run start --workspace=angular-menu" "npm run start --workspace=angular-toolbar" "npm run start --workspace=angular-overview" "npm run start --workspace=angular-shell"
scripts.dev: npm run build:libs && npm run start
